subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that thou hast been enabled, through the effulgent rays of the Sun of Truth, to attain His most great bounty, and hast been confirmed in the knowledge of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله از اشراقات انوار آفتاب حقیقت بفیض اکبر فائز شدی و بعرفان الله موید
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
